lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Hello. I Kangai Mau of the Rantuki tribe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you doing in Brimhaven?

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I looking for someone brave to go on important mission for me. Someone skilled in thievery and sneaking about. I am told I can find such people in Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me of this mission.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I need someone to go on a mission to the city of Ardougne. There you will find the house of Lord Handelmort. In his house he has our tribal totem.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: We need it back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does he have it?

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Lord Handelmort is an Ardougnese explorer which means he think he have the right to come to my tribal home, steal our stuff and put in his private museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I will get it back.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Best of luck with that adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I find Handelmort's house? Ardougne is a big place...

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I don't know Ardougne. You tell me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Let's hope I find some help soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of adventure!

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Adventure is something I may be able to give.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I need someone to go on a mission to the city of Ardougne. There you will find the house of Lord Handelmort. In his house he has our tribal totem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the Rantuki tribe?

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: A proud and noble tribe of Karamja. But now we are few, as men come from across sea, steal our land, and settle on our hunting grounds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you doing in Brimhaven?

sections.title: Trying to open the door to the mansion

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: It's a fine day to be out in the garden isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it's very nice.

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: Days like these make me glad to be alive!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... who are you?

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: My name is Horacio Dobson. I'm the gardener to Lord Handelmort. Take a look around this beautiful garden, all of this is my handiwork.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... do you garden round the back too?

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: That I do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't all of the security around the house get in your way then?

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: Ah, I'm used to all that. I have my keys, the guard dogs know me, and I know the combination to the door lock. It's rather easy, it's his middle name.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whose middle name?

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: Hum. I probably shouldn't have said that. Forget I mentioned it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you need any help?

lines.speaker: Horacio
lines.text: Trying to muscle in on my job eh? I'm more than happy to do this all by myself!

lines.speaker: GPDT employee
lines.text: Welcome to GPDT!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Hello there. My name is Cromperty. I am a Wizard, and an inventor.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: You must be [player name]. My good friend Sedridor has told me about you. As both wizard and inventor, he has aided me in my great invention!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what have you invented?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Ah! My latest invention is my patent pending teleportation block! It emits a low level magical signal, that will allow me to locate it anywhere in the world, and teleport anything

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: directly to it! I hope to revolutionise the entire teleportation system! Don't you think I'm great? Uh, I mean it's great?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the other block?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Well... Hmm. I would guess somewhere between here and the Wizards' Tower in Misthalin. All I know is that it hasn't got there yet as the wizards there would have contacted me.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: I'm using the GPDT for delivery. They assured me it would be delivered promptly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the GPDT?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: The Gielinor Parcel Delivery Team. They come very highly recommended. Their motto is: 'We aim to deliver your stuff at some point after you have paid us!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I be teleported please?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: By all means! I'm afraid I can't give you any specifics as to where you will come out however. Presumably wherever the other block is located.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that sounds good. Teleport me!

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Okey dokey! Ready?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Dipsolum sententa sententi!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds dangerous. Leave me here.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well done, that's very clever.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Yes it is isn't it? Forgive me for feeling a little smug, this is a major breakthrough in the field of teleportation!

sections.title: Using the Address label on Cromperty's crate
Using a second address label on the crate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now I just need someone to deliver it for me.

sections.title: Talking to GPDT employee after using the address label on the crate

lines.speaker: GPDT employee
lines.text: Welcome to GPDT!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, when are you going to deliver this crate?

lines.speaker: GPDT employee
lines.text: Well... I guess we could do it now...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, it's interesting in here.

lines.speaker: GPDT employee
lines.text: We're the premier delivery service in ALL of Gielinor!

sections.title: Opening the chest with the totem
Searching the chest with the Totem
Searching the chest after getting the totem

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Have you got our totem back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it's not that easy.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Bah, you no good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: You have??? Many thanks brave adventurer! Here, have some freshly cooked Karamjan fish, caught specially by my tribe.
